'''''Widow Maker''''' was a modified [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] [["Explorer" Scout Ship]] used by brother and sister [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Alic Surn|Alic]] and [[Vika Surn]]. In exchange for their transport, the Surns paid a five percent gap to the [[House Neuvalis|Neuvalis syndicate]], the ship's true owner. It was armed with one dual [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], and included two [[restraint capsule]]s for holding the bounties the Surns' apprehended.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
